sub: Go head-to-head, take on the world, or roll deep with a squad. Single or in teams — every battle is settled on EDGE.
hint: Tap a mode to see it in action

modes.name: Duels
modes.body: Challenge a friend head-to-head on the same markets. Sharpest forecast takes the win — and the bragging rights.

detail.headline: 1v1 — the sharper call wins.
detail.body: Send a challenge, both forecast the same market, and when reality lands the closer call takes the pot.

modes.name: Open Arena
modes.body: Take on anyone, anywhere. Drop into a live challenge and prove your edge against the whole field.

detail.headline: Take on the whole field.
detail.body: Drop into a live challenge with thousands of forecasters. Every sharp call climbs you up the live board.

modes.name: Squad Battles
modes.body: Team up and forecast as a crew. Pool your edge and go to war with rival squads for the top of the board.

detail.headline: Forecast as a crew.
detail.body: Pool your squad's edge and battle a rival team. The squad with the higher combined EDGE takes the round.
